DAISY.Name: Daisy Chainsaw
DAISY.Description: A game of magical champions, friendship, spectacular battles, and chainsaws.

Sheets.HeroineClassic: Daisy Chainsaw - Classic Magical Champion Sheet

SchemaVersion.Name: Data Schema Version
SchemaVersion.Hint: Internal version of the world's data structure.

BurnoutAbilities.Name: Ability Burnout
BurnoutAbilities.Hint: The book is inconsistent: the specific rule on page 65 adds BP for every spell and only Harm abilities.

LevelTwoUnlock.Name: Unlock Tier Two Abilities
LevelTwoUnlock.Hint: The advancement table grants them at Team Power Level 4, while the character creation text says Power Level 5.

PopcornInitiative.Name: Choose the Next Combatant
PopcornInitiative.Hint: Use the initiative system from the book, where the combatant ending their turn chooses who acts next.

ReduceMotion.Name: Reduce Sheet Motion
ReduceMotion.Hint: Disable most decorative motion and transitions on system sheets.

InitiativeRule.Name: Initiative rule
InitiativeRule.Hint: The original counts hits against the highest enemy Initiative; the Russian translation mistakenly uses the MC's Focus.

WeaponStatRule.Name: Weapon statistics
WeaponStatRule.Hint: The original fixes a weapon's first statistic to Main and its alternate to Offhand; the Russian translation allows either.

ProtectOddHarm.Name: Odd Harm while Protecting
ProtectOddHarm.Hint: Who takes the extra Harm when an odd total cannot be split evenly.

AutoDefeatEnemies.Name: Automatically defeat enemies
AutoDefeatEnemies.Hint: Mark an enemy defeated in the combat tracker when its HP reaches 0.

TrackActions.Name: Track actions
TrackActions.Hint: Track the active combatant's two actions and prevent overspending.

Combat.Title: Combat
Combat.NewRoundFirstTurn: First Turn of the New Round
Combat.InitiativeTie: The character with the higher Focus wins a tie.
Combat.InitiativeOriginalRule: Hits are counted against the highest enemy Initiative ({initiative}).
Combat.MoveDistance: Move {speed} increments of 5 feet, {distance} feet total.

Assist.Name: Assist
Assist.Description: An ally gains one additional die on their next roll.

Bolster.Name: Bolster
Bolster.Description: The next attack against you suffers -1 Primary.

Invoke.Name: Invoke
Invoke.Description: +1 die on your next roll before the end of your next turn; stacks twice.

JuryRig.Name: Jury-Rig
JuryRig.Description: Add a temporary Quirk to a weapon until you are reduced to half HP.

Protect.Name: Protect
Protect.Description: Attacks against an ally miss on 5 and 6, and Harm is split evenly.

help.Name: Assist
help.Description: One additional die on the next roll.

empowered.Name: Bolster
empowered.Description: The next attack against the target suffers -1 Primary.

invocation.Name: Invoke
invocation.Description: +1 die on the next roll before the end of the next turn; maximum 2.

improvised.Name: Jury-Rig
improvised.Description: A temporary additional Quirk while HP remains above half.

cover.Name: Protect
cover.Description: Attacks against an ally miss on 5 and 6, and Harm is split evenly.

marked.Name: Marked
marked.Description: One failed attack die becomes a hit for each Mark.

burning.Name: Aflame
burning.Description: Suffers Harm equal to the source's PL and cannot cast spells.

charmed.Name: Bewitched
charmed.Description: Cannot take offensive actions against the source.

bleeding.Name: Bleed
bleeding.Description: Suffers 1 Harm at the beginning of the round.

broken.Name: Crushed
broken.Description: Cannot use the specified weapon, ability, or body part.

entangled.Name: Entangled
entangled.Description: -2 Primary on attacks; attacks against the target gain +2 Secondary.

poisoned.Name: Poisoned
poisoned.Description: -1 Primary on attacks and Harm abilities.

taunted.Name: Taunted
taunted.Description: Must attack the source or move into range to do so.

beyond.Name: Pushing Your Limits
beyond.Description: For 3 turns: -2 Primary on attacks against the champion, +2 to their Primary, and no Burnout.

unconscious.Name: Unconscious
unconscious.Description: Must receive Assist within three turns or the champion dies.
unconscious.Expired: The champion has died because Assist was not provided in time.

PushLimits.Title: Push Your Limits
PushLimits.NotEnoughRequirements: At least two requirements must be met to Push Your Limits.
PushLimits.Extend: Forfeit the effect and extend Push Your Limits by 1 turn

Team.Label: Magical Champion Team
Team.Name: Team Name
Team.NoMembers: Assign this Team on champion sheets and its members will appear here.
Team.NewEpisodeConfirm: Reset the Team's BP and each linked MC's once-per-Episode scar save?

Enemy.Label: Enemy
Enemy.Name: Enemy Name
Enemy.NoTraits: Drag a trait from the Rule Browser.

RuleBrowser.Title: Rule Browser
RuleBrowser.EmptyGroup: There are no entries in this section yet.
RuleBrowser.CatalogUnavailable: The rules catalog has not loaded yet. Sheets will continue to work and entries will appear once the catalog is available.

Attack.TargetBeyond: Target Is Pushing Their Limits: -2 Primary

Burnout.Title: Burnout
Burnout.WithinLimit: The Burnout Pool was not exceeded.
Burnout.ActionFailed: The action fails and the champion suffers 1 Harm.

Unconscious.Title: Unconscious
Unconscious.Content: The champion must receive Assist within three turns or die. After receiving Assist, they recover to 1 HP when combat ends.

Assisted.Title: Assist Received
Assisted.Content: The champion remains unconscious and recovers to 1 HP when combat ends.

Death.Title: The Champion Dies
Death.Content: Three turns passed without the Assist maneuver.

Scar.Title: Killing Blow Avoided
Scar.Content: All Harm is negated. The champion gains the permanent scar "{scar}" and immediately Pushes Their Limits.

PushLimits.Title: Push Your Limits
PushLimits.Content: For 3 turns: attacks against the champion suffer -2 Primary, their attacks gain +2 Primary, and abilities add no BP.

Scar.Title: Avoid the killing blow?
Scar.Content: {name} may negate all of this Harm, gain a permanent scar, and immediately Push Their Limits.

Notifications.RuleBrowserActionFailed: The Rule Browser action could not be completed.
Notifications.SheetActionFailed: The sheet action could not be completed.
Notifications.SelectTokenOrOwnedItem: Select a token or open an item owned by an Actor.
Notifications.UseItemFromActorSheet: This item must be used from a character sheet.
Notifications.CannotCastWhileAflame: The champion is Aflame and cannot cast spells.
Notifications.MigrationComplete: The Daisy Chainsaw world data has been updated.
Notifications.MigrationFailed: The Daisy Chainsaw world data could not be updated.
Notifications.CatalogUnavailable: The rules catalog is unavailable; sheets are using empty lists.
Notifications.AlreadyApplied: The effect was already applied to {name}. Hold Shift to repeat it.
Notifications.EpisodeReset: New Episode resources have been reset.
Notifications.NotEnoughActions: Not enough actions for “{label}”: {cost} required, {remaining} remaining.

Errors.InvalidActorType: This action is not available for an Actor of type {type}.
Errors.NoPermission: You do not have permission to perform this action.
Errors.AttributeRange: {attribute} must be an integer from 1 to 6.
Errors.AttributeOverspent: {spent} statistic points were allocated, but only {budget} are available.
Errors.AttributePointsRemaining: {remaining} statistic points remain to be allocated.
Errors.InvalidMainWeapon: A valid Main weapon has not been selected.
Errors.InvalidOffhandWeapon: A valid Offhand weapon has not been selected.
Errors.UnsupportedMainParameter: The Primary statistic is not supported by the Main weapon.
Errors.UnsupportedOffhandParameter: The Secondary statistic is not supported by the Offhand weapon.
Errors.ParametersMustDiffer: Primary and Secondary must be different statistics.
Errors.QuirkSelection: Your permanent Quirk comes from the Main weapon; a second is available only when both weapons are the same.
Errors.MainQuirkMissing: No permanent Main weapon Quirk has been selected.
Errors.TooManySelections: {selected} abilities and spells were selected, but only {available} slots are available.
Errors.SelectionSlotsRemaining: {remaining} ability or spell slots remain to be filled.
Errors.SpellLimit: The number of spells exceeds the base Charm - 1 limit; check slot exchanges during advancement.
Errors.AbilityLevelLocked: One or more abilities are above the available tier {level}.
Errors.RenderFailed: The system interface could not be rendered.
Errors.RollFailed: The roll could not be completed.
Errors.TableNotFound: The rules table could not be found.
Errors.ChatActionFailed: The chat-card action could not be applied.
Errors.RuleNotFound: The rules entry could not be found.
